description:
Overview:

Made From High-quality Materials, This Electronic Candle Is Durable, Allowing You To Enjoy Its Charming Flickering Light For Many Holiday Seasons To Come.
With Its Creative And Design, This Is A Perfect Addition To Your Christmas Decor. Place It On A Mantel, Shelf, Or Table To Create A Captivating Centerpiece That Will Impress Your Guests.
The Lights Inside Are Energy-efficient, Requiring Minimal Power To Produce A Stunning Visual Effect. This Ensures That You Can Enjoy The Warm Without Worrying About Running Up Your Electricity Bill.
Whether Used As A Standalone Piece Or Combined With Other Holiday Decorations, This Christmas Will Your Festive Setup And Make It Feel Truly Magical. The Holiday Spirit With This Delightful Ornament That Will Bring Joy And Cheer To Your Home.

Material: wrought iron
Size: White-0067, green-0068, red-0069
